case_title: GORMAN FRANCES D. VS CHRISTIE, LINDA, CHIEF OPERATING OFFICER BY DESIGN

docket_entries.description: POS TO LINDA CHRISTIE CHIEF OPERATING OFFICER,BY DESIGN NOT SIGNED BY ADDRESSEE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,481.47 FILED BY GORMAN FRANCES D. AS TO DEFENDANT CHRISTIE, LINDA, CHIEF OPERATING OFFICER BY DESIGN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-15-1992 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 00
